roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTW/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE06-23-22 (DAW) AND TO SET JURY TRIAL (DOPU)/

/CAL: ACM ELIG REPT/X: ACM REPORT RECEIVED/X: ORAL MOTION BY THE PEOPLE TO NOT RELEASE TO ACM/ARG&SUB/X: DEFENDANT MAY ATTEND RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT HER HOUSE/DTC/WEAP/X: MUST NOT POSSESS CONTROLLED SUBSTANCES/CTORD:MUST REMAIN ARREST FREE/HD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH  ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALLBE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS INPLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: PROGRESS REPORT AND CASE STATUS NEXT DATE IN DEPT, 22/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:SFPD SGT, DANIEL BURNS/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S1 - PHOTO OF A MALE ON HOSPITAL BED SHOWING HIP WOUND/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 2 - PHOTO OF INJURY/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 3 - PHOTO OF VEHICLE REAR END SHOWING LICENSE PLATE/  /WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER ERIC EASTLUND/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER VASHTI THOMAS/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 4 - PHOTO OF OFFICER THOMAS HOLDING A CLIP/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 5 - PHOTO OF OLIVE COLORED FIREARM/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 6 - PHOTO OFCAR TRUNK INTERIOR WITH OLIVE COLORED FIREARM/EXHM:PEOPLE'S 7 - CLETS CRIMINAL HISTORY PRINTOUT FOR DEFENDANT/X:COURT GRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'SORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT AS TO PRIOR #4 TO REFLECT COUNTY OF ALAMEDA ON 10-17-17,/HTA1:1, 2, 3 AND 4/X:DEFENDANT ALSO HELD TO ANSWER ON ALLEGATION OF GREAT BODILY INJURY PURSUANT TO PC 12022,5(A) AND USE OF A FIREARM PURSUANT TO PC 12022,7(E) AT COUNTS 1 AND 2,/X:THE MISDEMEANOR CHARGES AT COUNTS 5 AND 6 ARE CERTIFIED,/NB/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT IN DEPT, 20 ON 04-11-22/DOP/TWA/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 22ON 04-22-22/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/X:SUBPOENA RECORDS ENVELOPES #1 THROUGH #4 ARE ALSO RELASED TO THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY WITH EC1560 STIPULATION FROM DEFENSE COUNSEL,/

/CAL: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEARAND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC ORTHE VICTIM,/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITYREPORT IN DEPARTMENT 20/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL AND ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES ACONFLICT,/CON: ERWIN FREDRICH/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 03-29-22 (10), 05-16-22 (60)/NB/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SAORD/SA1: SIR CASEY LATOUR, BLACK MALE, DOB 05-07-85/SAORD3//CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPARTMENT 20/DAWF/TE: 3 HOURS/CONTD: HEARING ON PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IN DEPARTMENT 12/DOP/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: DUPLICATE OF LINE 601/
